description: You are a Facility Planner for a state government agency opening a new Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) branch. Transform the provided open building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a functional customer service center featuring three distinct zones: 'Waiting Area', 'Service Counters', and 'Back Office'. The layout must include at least two interior partition walls to separate the public-facing area from the employee-only back office, at least three defined rooms (named or color-coded to demarcate zones), and at least two doors for secure access. Furnish the Waiting Area with at least 30 chairs or benches, construct the Service Counters using at least eight desks and eight office chairs, and equip the Back Office with at least four administrative storage units such as shelving or filing cabinets. Save the completed layout.
